title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 245.055 - Procedure
text:
245.055.  Procedure. — After said notice has been so given the matter shall be proceeded with in the same manner as is provided for where articles of association for the formation of a levee district have been filed.
(RSMo 1939 § 12543) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10953; 1919 § 4647
